text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 35 

DEATH_DT 

LABEL: Date of Death 

DESCRIPTION: Beneficiary's date of death, if applicable. If the beneficiary is deceased, then this variable is populated 
with the death date, which may be in the calendar year of the data file or the two prior years. 

SHORT NAME: DEATH_DT 

LONG NAME: DEATH_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS
